role: Test directory covering index recovery and LLM retry logic for the ArchSpine summarization system.
responsibility: Collectively, these test suites verify that the SummarizationTask can resume from saved index states and that LLM interactions correctly handle retryable errors, ensuring reliable operation under failure conditions.

children.role: Test suite for the SummarizationTask, focusing on index-based resume recovery from aggregated state.
Unit test suite for the LLM retry logic module.
